description: Trajectory-synthesized workflow for repeated investigation-and-plan tasks backed by 5 successful task(s).
trigger: Use when a task in the investigation-and-plan family needs the repeated validation-backed workflow SEA observed in recent work.

preconditions.text: The task belongs to the investigation-and-plan family.

instructions.text: Restate the target files, constraints, and intended validation before editing investigation-and-plan work.
Keep the change set bounded while executing the main investigation-and-plan workflow.
Run the highest-signal validation and record an explicit closeout summary before finishing the task.

validationPlan.description: Run the highest-signal validation available for the task and summarize the result.

fallbackGuidance: If the expected workflow no longer matches the task, summarize the mismatch and fall back to normal task-specific reasoning.

examples.summary: Success on investigation-and-plan (D3) for goal: Debug localhost:8765 slow refresh. Validation was recorded. No corrective guidance was logged. 12 tool error(s) were recorded.
Success on investigation-and-plan (D4) for goal: Refine dashboard UI layout. Validation was recorded. No corrective guidance was logged. 9 tool error(s) were recorded.
Success on investigation-and-plan (D1) for goal: why the pi process on this tmux pane 2.1 stucked. Validation was recorded. No corrective guidance was logged. 17 tool error(s) were recorded.

adoptionEvidence.rationale: SEA automatically approved and installed this learned skill for runtime use.
